caption.caption: CLOSE FILE

eSignature.ConfirmationMessage: By completing this action, I certify that I have reviewed the changes that will be made to the system. I have approval and permission to perform this change.

command.releaseAction: If ({[SterisPW]udtHardwareConfig.dMdl} == 2 ) then ;Display "61- PROCESS_680PG" /W 1280 /H 740 else ;Display "63- PROCESS_380PG_480PG" /W 1280 /H 740 endif

vbaItem.vbaCode:
Dim FileName As String Private Permission As Boolean Private AllDisplays As Displays Private WithEvents HMIAppCli As DisplayClient.Application 'app events used to update real time status Attribute HMIAppCli.VB_VarHelpID = -1
Private Sub btnViewFile_Released() Dim DataLine As String
If lbDirectoryFiles.ListIndex <> -1 Then
' Modify visiblity of the screen elements lbDirectoryFiles.Visible = False lbViewFile.Visible = True btnViewFile.Visible = False btnCloseFile.Visible = True btnPrintFile.Visible = True btnTransferFiles.Visible = False
'Clear the file viewer listbox lbViewFile.Clear
'Get the required file name FileName = "C:\Data\Print\" & lbDirectoryFiles.List(lbDirectoryFiles.ListIndex)
txtFileName.Caption = FileName txtFileName.Visible = True
'Open the file and read each line Open FileName For Input As #1
While Not EOF(1) Line Input #1, DataLine ' read in data 1 line at a time lbViewFile.AddItem DataLine Wend
Close #1
End If
VerifyCRC
End Sub
Private Sub Display_AnimationStart()
Dim file As Variant
Set AllDisplays = LoadedDisplays ' Load All Displays
Set HMIAppCli = Me.Application
' Modify visiblity of the screen elements lbDirectoryFiles.Visible = True lbViewFile.Visible = False btnViewFile.Visible = True btnCloseFile.Visible = False btnPrintFile.Visible = False txtFileName.Visible = False txtFileNotSecured.Visible = False txtFileSecured.Visible = False
Permission = AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityEngineer
If Permission Then btnTransferFiles.Visible = True Else btnTransferFiles.Visible = False End If
file = Dir("C:\Data\Print\")
'Read name of each file in data folder While (file <> "") lbDirectoryFiles.AddItem file file = Dir Wend
'Reset message visibility txtDriveAvail.Visible = False
End Sub
Private Sub btnCloseFile_Released()
' Modify visiblity of the screen elements lbDirectoryFiles.Visible = True txtFileName.Visible = False lbViewFile.Visible = False btnViewFile.Visible = True btnCloseFile.Visible = False btnPrintFile.Visible = False txtFileNotSecured.Visible = False txtFileSecured.Visible = False btnTransferFiles.Visible = True
End Sub Private Sub btnPrintFile_Released()
If AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091 Dim xlApp As Object Dim tmpString As String Dim printerName As String 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918
Set xlApp = CreateObject("WScript.shell") printerName = AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").HMITagGroup.Item("{[SterisPW]sPrinterName}").Value 'Print to PDF tmpString = "NOTEPAD /PT """ & txtFileName.Caption & """ ""PDFCreator""" 'Open text file in notepad and send the print command to print to default printer xlApp.Run (tmpString)
'Print to USB coupon printer tmpString = "NOTEPAD /PT " & Chr(34) & txtFileName.Caption & Chr(34) & " " & Chr(34) & printerName & Chr(34) 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 'Open text file in notepad and send the print command to print to default printer xlApp.Run (tmpString)
Set xlApp = Nothing Else MsgBox ("This HMI is not the Report Master") End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 End Sub Private Sub btnTransferFiles_Released()
Dim file, filePDF As Variant, strFrom, strTo, strFromPDF As String
strFrom = "C:\Data\Print\" strFromPDF = "C:\Data\PDF\" strTo = AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").HMITagGroup.Item("{[SterisPW]sRemoteNetworkPath}").Value 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 changed D:\ to a variable file = Dir(strFrom) filePDF = Dir(strFromPDF)
Set FSO = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
'Move each file to USB folder If FSO.FolderExists(strTo) Then 'Reset message visibility txtDriveAvail.Visible = False
While (file <> "") Name strFrom & file As strTo & file file = Dir(strFrom) Wend lbDirectoryFiles.Clear
While (filePDF <> "") Name strFromPDF & filePDF As strTo & filePDF filePDF = Dir(strFromPDF) Wend lbDirectoryFiles.Clear
Else txtDriveAvail.Visible = True End If
End Sub
Private Sub VerifyCRC()
Dim strDataLine, strFileName, strLastLine As String, lStrLen, lCRC, lTemp, lSeed As Long, i As Integer
strFileName = txtFileName.Caption lSeed = 20160413
If strFileName <> "FILENAME" Then Open strFileName For Input As #1
lCRC = 0 lTemp = 0
While Not EOF(1) lCRC = lCRC + lTemp lTemp = 0 Line Input #1, strDataLine ' read data 1 line at a time strLastLine = strDataLine
lStrLen = Len(strDataLine)
For i = 1 To lStrLen
lTemp = lTemp + Asc(strDataLine) 'Compute each character ASCII value to get checksum strDataLine = Right(strDataLine, lStrLen - i)
Next
Wend
lCRC = (lCRC + lSeed) ^ 2 'Compute sum and random SEED to get the CRC checksum value
If strLastLine = ("Checksum: " & lCRC) Then 'Compare file's checksum and computed checksum txtFileSecured.Visible = True 'If checksums are the same, file is secured txtFileNotSecured.Visible = False Else txtFileSecured.Visible = False 'If checksums are different, file is not secured txtFileNotSecured.Visible = True End If
Close #1 End If
End Sub
Private Sub HMIAppCli_Login(ByVal UserName As String)
Call GetCurrentUserCode Call SetObjectSecurity
End Sub Public Sub GetCurrentUserCode() ' Extract Curent User Security Code
AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityEngineer = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("A") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecuritySupervisor = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("B") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityOperator = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("C") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityGuest = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("D") AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityMaintenance = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("E")
End Sub
Private Sub SetObjectSecurity()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
Permission = AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityEngineer Or AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityMaintenance Or AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecuritySupervisor Or AllDisplays.Item("HEADER").blnSecurityOperator
If Permission Then
btnPrintFile.Visible = True
Else
btnPrintFile.Visible = False
End If
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler: LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: SetObjectSecurity(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError Resume Next End Sub
Private Sub lbDirectoryFiles_Click()
End Sub
Private Sub Text7_Click()
End Sub Private Sub lbViewFile_Click()
End Sub
